word.title: JSON Schema for the Concept of Node Types
word.name: JSON Schema for the concept of node types
word.description: This is the JSON Schema for elements of the concept of node types. Every element of this concept must validate against this JSON schema.

slug.name: slug
slug.title: Slug
slug.description: The unique identifier for this node type

name.name: name
name.title: Name
name.description: The display name of this node type

tagType.name: tag type
tagType.title: Tag Type
tagType.description: The nostr event tag type that carries the content for nodes of this type (e.g., json, image)

description.name: description
description.title: Description
description.description: A description of this node type

validationConceptSlug.name: validation concept slug
validationConceptSlug.title: Validation Concept Slug
validationConceptSlug.description: The slug of the concept that provides the validation mechanism for this node type (e.g., json-schemas, image-validation-scripts)

coreNodeCount.name: core node count
coreNodeCount.title: Core Node Count
coreNodeCount.description: The number of core nodes in the concept skeleton for concepts of this node type
